coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 9:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 0% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/10. 6:00 at 90%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/10. 90-90% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 90% for 6:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/10. 6:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 6:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 115%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/10. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/10. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/10. 115% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 8 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/10. 5:00 at 92%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 92% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 28% done. 7 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/10. 92% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/10. 92% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/10. 21 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/10. 1:00 at 118%. Cadence: 88-95 rpm. Seated. 6 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/10. You're building something real here. 6 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/10. You've accumulated 12min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 23 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 98% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 98%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 130% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 82-90 rpm, 130-130% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 130%, 82-90 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 58% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 18 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 33 minutes in. 95% at 82-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 3 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 38 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 38 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 13 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 76% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 76% through session. Rep 8/10. You've done 24min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 76% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 43 minutes in. 112% FTP, 75-85 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 1 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/10. 1 to go. You've accumulated 26min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 9 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 1 intervals left. 9 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/10. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 118-118% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 7 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 2:00 at 118%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 7 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 2:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 118% × 2:00. Then 7min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 87% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 87% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 49 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 7:12. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
